title: Artialic Journey II
description: A modpack for Minecraft Forge suitable for everyone, from the casual gamer to the advanced one. Magic, adventure, engineering, RPG: we have it all!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ccb3ad280ea6ca9a2a8001c3dc1760a217bd2b8.png)


Explore hundreds of different structures, discover new landscapes, fight new mobs, defeat bosses all over the 9 dimensions included by Artialic Journey II, expand your knowledge to more than 22800 items, keep track of them using the Completionists' Index and learn about them through the included quests. 

### **_WEEKLY UPDATES!_**



# Features
  
❓ **MORE THAN 400 QUESTS** (Heracles)

🏰 **PROTECT YOUR BASE** (Lucky's Blocky Siege)

🏠 **NEW VILLAGES** (CTOV / Better Villages)

🚪 **NEW DIMENSIONS** (The Aether + Add-Ons / Blue Skies / Deeper and Darker / Ad Astra)

🆕 **OVERHAULED VANILLA DIMENSIONS** (Incendium / Nullscape / and more...)

🪨 **INCREDIBLE WORLD GENERATION** (Terra / Terrestria / William Wythers' mods / and more...)

🔧 **TECH STUFF** (Create / Tom's Simple Storage Mod)

🗡️ **CHALLENGING DUNGEONS** (Wesley's Roguelike / IDAS / Dungeon Now Loading / and more...)

👑 **AWESOME BOSS FIGHTS** (L_Ender's Cataclysm)

🪄 **MAGIC** (Ars Nouveau / Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks / Spell Engine / Accessories)

⚔️ **RPG TOUCH** (Tierify / Bountiful / Better Combat / Ice and Fire / Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty)

🤩 **SHADERS SUPPORT** (Embeddium / Oculus)

🌿 **QoL ADDITIONS** (Advancement Plaques / AppleSkin / Corpse / and more...)

🎮 **ENHANCED MULTIPLAYER EXPERIENCE** (ESSENTIAL Mod / Lootr / Ping Wheel)

✅ **300+ MODS**

_~~**THE CREEPY MISTERY LOOMS OVER YOUR LIVES.**~~_


</details>

<details>
<summary>Other</summary>

## ALLOCATED RAM

6GB should run fine. If you encounter any issue, try allocating more RAM.

## SHADERS

If you want to use shaders, make sure to allocate at least 8GB of RAM.

## CREDITS

All credits go to the original mod creators.
This modpack includes the following mods:
- [Advancement Plaques](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques)
- [Sinytra Connector](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector)
- [Obscure API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-api)
- [Gnumus Settlement](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gnumus-settlement)
- [JTLElisa's Awesome Dungeons mods, Better Villages and Library Ferret](https://www.curseforge.com/members/jtl_elisa/projects)
- [Wesley's Roguelike Dungeons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wrd)
- [Dungeon Crawl](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-crawl)
- [AquaCulture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- [Lucky's Blocky Siege](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/prelaws-blocky-siege)
- [Lucky's Spelunker's Charm II](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii)
- [Born In Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
- [Cave Dweller Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined)
- [Framework ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
- [Gobber](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber)
- [Goblin Traders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders)
- [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks & Sophisticated Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Structory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory)
- [Tierify](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tierify)
- [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)
- [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)
- [Netherific](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/netherific)
- [PVJ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-vibrant-journeys)
- [Sky Villages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sky-villages-forge)
- [WRD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wrd)

_From the same creator of Project Terranova._
